title: Diff Lab triage improvements
purpose: Turn raw artifact diffs into prioritized triage evidence for changed imports, strings, functions, findings, and graph deltas.
actions: Add risk summary for changed dangerous imports and sensitive strings
Expose diff rows with object refs and labels in CLI JSON
Add TUI Inspector details for changed rows

criteria: Existing diff command output remains backward compatible in text summary
JSON output includes risk summary and per-row object refs
Tests cover added, removed, changed, and unchanged rows
Changed risky evidence is visible in Report Lab coverage

summary: Implemented Diff Lab risk summary, per-row risk reasons/refs in JSON, and persisted risk metadata.
